languages.text: Следуя вашему приказу, разведотряды упорно приближаются к планете. Доклады становятся короче и напряженней: счетчики излучения внутри шаттлов зашкаливают. Один из кораблей передает в рубку необычный сигнал: пилот разглядел среди космического мусора заброшенный шаттл, похожий на имперский. Правда, приблизиться к нему не получится — слишком сильное излучение.

Following your orders, the scouting teams move steadily closer to the planet. The reports become shorter and tenser: radiation counters inside the shuttles are off the scale. One of the ships transmits an unusual signal to the control room: the pilot saw what appears to be an abandoned Imperial shuttle among the void debris. However, you cannot get close to it — the radiation is too strong.
languages.original_text: Следуя вашему приказу, разведотряды упорно приближаются к планете. Доклады становятся короче и напряженней: счетчики излучения внутри шаттлов зашкаливают. Один из кораблей передает в рубку необычный сигнал: пилот разглядел среди космического мусора заброшенный шаттл, похожий на имперский. Правда, приблизиться к нему не получится — слишком сильное излучение.

traits.locale_text: Following your orders, the scouting teams move steadily closer to the planet. The reports become shorter and tenser: radiation counters inside the shuttles are off the scale. One of the ships transmits an unusual signal to the control room: the pilot saw what appears to be an abandoned Imperium shuttle among the void debris. However, you cannot get close to it — the radiation is too strong.

One of the ships transmits an unusual signal to the control room: the pilot saw what appears to be an abandoned Imperium shuttle among the void debris. However, you cannot get close to it — the radiation is too strong.

Following your orders, the scouting teams move steadily closer to the planet. The reports become shorter and tenser: radiation counters inside the shuttles are off the scale. One of the ships transmits an unusual signal to the control room: the pilot saw what appears to be an abandoned Imperium shuttle among the void debris. However, you cannot get close to it — the radiation is too strong.

languages.text: あなたに従うように、偵察隊は惑星に近づいていく。報告は短く、緊張が高まる。宇宙船内の放射線計は針が振り切れる。ある宇宙船が、制御室に異常な信号を送る。パイロットは、宇宙空間の破片の中に、帝国の宇宙船らしきものが放棄されているのを目にしたという。しかし、近づけない。放射線が強すぎる。
languages.original_text: Following your orders, the scouting teams move steadily closer to the planet. The reports become shorter and tenser: radiation counters inside the shuttles are off the scale. One of the ships transmits an unusual signal to the control room: the pilot saw what appears to be an abandoned Imperium shuttle among the void debris. However, you cannot get close to it — the radiation is too strong.

traits.locale_text: あなたに従うように、偵察隊は惑星に近づいていく。報告は短く、緊張が高まる。宇宙船内の放射線計は針が振り切れる。ある宇宙船が、制御室に異常な信号を送る。パイロットは、宇宙空間の破片の中に、帝国の宇宙船らしきものが放棄されているのを目にしたという。しかし、近づけない。放射線が強すぎる。

languages.text: Siguiendo tus órdenes, los equipos de exploración se acercan lentamente al planeta. Sus informes se vuelven cada vez más breves y tensos y los contadores de radiación en las lanzaderas se sale de las escalas. Una de las naves transmite un extraño mensaje a la sala de control. Su piloto ha visto una lanzadera Imperial abandonada entre los restos, pero es imposible acercarse. La radiación es demasiado intensa.
languages.original_text: Following your orders, the scouting teams move steadily closer to the planet. The reports become shorter and tenser: radiation counters inside the shuttles are off the scale. One of the ships transmits an unusual signal to the control room: the pilot saw what appears to be an abandoned Imperial shuttle among the void debris. However, you cannot get close to it — the radiation is too strong.

traits.locale_text: Siguiendo tus órdenes, los equipos de exploración se acercan lentamente al planeta. Sus informes se vuelven cada vez más breves y tensos y los contadores de radiación en las lanzaderas se sale de las escalas. Una de las naves transmite un extraño mensaje a la sala de control. Su piloto ha visto una lanzadera Imperial abandonada entre los restos, pero es imposible acercarse. La radiación es demasiado intensa.

languages.text: 遵照你的指令，侦察队向行星持续逼近。传回的报告越发简短急促：穿梭机内的辐射指数已经爆表。其中一艘舰船向指挥室发回特殊信号：飞行员在虚空残骸间瞥见一架疑似废弃的帝国穿梭机。然而辐射太强，无法靠近。
languages.original_text: Following your orders, the scouting teams move steadily closer to the planet. The reports become shorter and tenser: radiation counters inside the shuttles are off the scale. One of the ships transmits an unusual signal to the control room: the pilot saw what appears to be an abandoned Imperial shuttle among the void debris. However, you cannot get close to it — the radiation is too strong.

traits.locale_text: 遵照你的指令，侦察队向行星持续逼近。传回的报告越发简短急促：穿梭机内的辐射指数已经爆表。其中一艘舰船向指挥室发回特殊信号：飞行员在虚空残骸间瞥见一架疑似废弃的帝国穿梭机。然而辐射太强，无法靠近。

languages.text: Gemäß deiner Befehle nähern sich die Erkundungsteams langsam dem Planeten. Die Berichte werden kürzer und nervöser. Die Strahlungswerte in den Shuttles sind außer Kontrolle. Eines der Schiffe sendet ein ungewöhnliches Signal an den Kontrollraum. Der Pilot will ein verlassenes imperiales Shuttle zwischen den Trümmern in der Leere gesehen haben. Allerdings ist keine Annäherung möglich ... dazu ist die Strahlung einfach zu stark.
languages.original_text: Following your orders, the scouting teams move steadily closer to the planet. The reports become shorter and tenser: radiation counters inside the shuttles are off the scale. One of the ships transmits an unusual signal to the control room: the pilot saw what appears to be an abandoned Imperial shuttle among the void debris. However, you cannot get close to it — the radiation is too strong.

traits.locale_text: Gemäß deiner Befehle nähern sich die Erkundungsteams langsam dem Planeten. Die Berichte werden kürzer und nervöser. Die Strahlungswerte in den Shuttles sind außer Kontrolle. Eines der Schiffe sendet ein ungewöhnliches Signal an den Kontrollraum. Der Pilot will ein verlassenes imperiales Shuttle zwischen den Trümmern in der Leere gesehen haben. Allerdings ist keine Annäherung möglich ... dazu ist die Strahlung einfach zu stark.

languages.text: Emirlerin üzerine keşif ekipleri, gezegene istikrarlı bir şekilde yaklaşıyor. Raporlar kısalıyor ve gerginleşiyor: Mekiklerin içindeki radyasyon sayaçları sınırları aşıyor. Gemilerden biri kontrol odasına olağan dışı bir sinyal iletiyor: Pilot, uçsuz enkazı arasında terk edilmiş bir İmparatorluk mekiğine benzeyen bir şey görmüş. Ancak ona yaklaşmak mümkün değil... Radyasyon çok güçlü.
languages.original_text: Following your orders, the scouting teams move steadily closer to the planet. The reports become shorter and tenser: radiation counters inside the shuttles are off the scale. One of the ships transmits an unusual signal to the control room: the pilot saw what appears to be an abandoned Imperial shuttle among the void debris. However, you cannot get close to it — the radiation is too strong.

traits.locale_text: Emirlerin üzerine keşif ekipleri, gezegene istikrarlı bir şekilde yaklaşıyor. Raporlar kısalıyor ve gerginleşiyor: Mekiklerin içindeki radyasyon sayaçları sınırları aşıyor. Gemilerden biri kontrol odasına olağan dışı bir sinyal iletiyor: Pilot, uçsuz enkazı arasında terk edilmiş bir İmparatorluk mekiğine benzeyen bir şey görmüş. Ancak ona yaklaşmak mümkün değil... Radyasyon çok güçlü.

languages.text: Conformément à vos ordres, l'équipe de reconnaissance s'approche de la planète. Les rapports se font de plus en plus courts et tendus ; à l'intérieur des navettes, les instruments permettant de mesurer les radiations émettent des hurlements stridents. L'une des navettes transmet un signal inhabituel à la salle de contrôle : parmi les débris qui flottent dans le vide, le pilote a aperçu ce qui semble être une navette impériale abandonnée. Malheureusement, impossible de l'approcher, les radiations sont trop fortes.
languages.original_text: Following your orders, the scouting teams move steadily closer to the planet. The reports become shorter and tenser: radiation counters inside the shuttles are off the scale. One of the ships transmits an unusual signal to the control room: the pilot saw what appears to be an abandoned Imperial shuttle among the void debris. However, you cannot get close to it — the radiation is too strong.
